chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. S – 71 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of case 1. For orders on CMA No.717/2025 (Ex.A) 2. For orders on CMA No.718/2025 (C/A) 13.10.2025 Mr. Mansoor Hussain Maitlo, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Saeed Ahmed Wassan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< Counsel for the Petitioner has failed to point out any cogent ground, which prima facie suggest, that the contemnor has disobeyed the orders of this Court. Under the circumstances, no case for contempt is made-out, accordingly, the listed contempt application is dismissed. Judge ARBROHI
